message:
style: rustfmt formatting, import ordering, and std→core migration

Three minor hygiene fixes across vendored crates:

color-types/src/lib.rs (+9 lines):
- Reformat multi-line assert! macro call in srgb8 monotonicity test
  to conform to rustfmt line-length rules (was a single long line)

surface/change.rs (+2/-2):
- Reorder `use frankenterm_cell::{...}` imports alphabetically:
  `unicode_column_width` before `AttributeChange` and `CellAttributes`

surface/line/storage.rs (+4/-4):
- Replace `core::mem::size_of` with `core::mem::size_of` (was
  `std::mem::size_of`), aligning with the crate's no-std-compatible
  convention of preferring `core::` over `std::` for reexports

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
